expo.name: PocketDex AI
expo.description: Identify and collect animals you encounter using on-device AI.
expo.author: Piyush Singh

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PocketDex AI needs camera access to identify animals.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PocketDex AI uses your location to tag discovery habitats.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PocketDex AI uses your location to tag discovery habitats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PocketDex AI saves discovered animal images to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: PocketDex AI needs camera access to identify animals.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: PocketDex AI uses your location to tag discovery habitats.

plugins.photosPermission: PocketDex AI saves discovered animal images.
